rationale: The citing paper centers on causal effectiveness and design of sales contests, and its note explicitly says prior work largely optimized contest structure while assuming contests work—this directly aligns with the cited paper’s contribution on causal tests of sales contest prize structure (multiple winners vs ranked prizes). Given this strong topical/mechanism overlap and the exact DOI-matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.46.3.356), the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than incidental.
